reviews.review_description: Please add the update that was shown in the trailer (update 9), since the update in the trailer is much better than the current one. Also, could you make it so that the song "Tophats N’ Tools - Solar.mp3 (ChimpLab VR OST)“ plays when entering the game, and create a lobby room with all the monster statues and their names? Also, if possible, add a new monster similar to the Gus monster, but one that is completely black with only small white eyes visible, and that makes the sound ”Wake Up The President." Add all the monsters from the first part of the game Lethal Ape, such as Ashy, and Sandman, to the game. Replace the lobby music with the original soundtrack from the game “Lethal Ape”. Add a Boombox to the game and make sure it plays the original music. Add an elevator to the game. Add a location called “backrooms” that contains a monster named “unknown” Add a pool to the first floor if there isn’t one. Thank you so much! Good luck!!!

I love your roblox game and your vr game but the new updates of lethal ape 4 just kinda suck could you please add back the old monsters and the old map with backrooms the dark halls and cave and the old holdable flash light like in lethal ape roblox,please bring it back
You can you replace  goop as gooba? I love your mobile version and vr version,  I played both of them.

I played it a lot in the revamp version, and I explore the entire map And I explored the backrooms and I also went to the third floor. I made the fourth floor and then I just saw a big guy and then suddenly the owner decided me God I got to I gotta install uninstall the old version and then reinstall it because there’s a new version which is a better version with new footsteps caves removed back rooms Freds new footsteps and monsters room.
This game isnt a bad game but it better than any other it a perfect game and it has monster
